detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization method for Xilinx HDCP 2.2 Transmitter driver. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 jb 02/21/19 Initial release 3.00 jb 12/24/21 File name changed from xhdcp22_tx_sinit.c to xhdcp22_tx_dp_sinit.c. Also all APIs and structure names are added with suffix _dp.
